title: Toggle Particles
description: This project adds a simple keybind to toggle particles on and off instantly. Configure the bind in Minecraft Controls and switch particles anytime while playing.
body:
# Particle Toggle Mod

Simple Fabric mod for Minecraft that lets you quickly toggle particles on or off with a single keybind.

## Features

* Toggle particles instantly with one key
* Fully customizable keybind
* Lightweight and easy to use
* Keybind available in Minecraft Controls
* Perfect for PvP and cleaner gameplay

## How to Use

1. Open Minecraft
2. Go to `Options → Controls → Key Binds`
3. Find `Particle Toggle`
4. Set your preferred key
5. Press the key anytime to enable or disable particles

## Why Use This Mod?

* Better visibility during PvP
* Less visual clutter
* Cleaner gameplay experience
* Can improve focus in fights and crowded areas

## Compatibility

* Fabric
* Minecraft 1.21.4

## Short Description

> Lightweight Fabric mod that allows you to toggle particles on/off using a customizable keybind directly from Minecraft Controls.
